description: Playwright for the Windows desktop, from Bun — drive native GUIs via UI Automation + MCP.
name: io.github.ObscuritySRL/bun-uia

environmentVariables.description: Capability profile: 'readonly' (inspect/read only), 'safe' (read + input + window — default), or 'full' (also os + fs tools).
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to allow OS-level tools (launch_app, run_program, open_path) regardless of profile.
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_OS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names or categories to additionally allow on top of the profile.
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_ALLOW

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names or categories to deny, overriding the profile and BUN_UIA_ALLOW.
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_DENY

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to use the real hardware cursor for clicks/drags instead of the default cursor-free (background) input path.
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_CURSOR

environmentVariables.description: Sandbox root directory that read_file/write_file/list_dir are confined to when fs tools are enabled.
environmentVariables.name: BUN_UIA_FS_ROOT
